text.title: DORA + Reliability Metrics Report Worked Example
text.summary: One worked example end-to-end for dora-metrics — narrative trace plus the final artefact.

section.title: Narrative trace
section.p: Operator triggers the methodology with a real task signal. Decision tree confirms preconditions hold. Inputs gathered per Prerequisites. Template filled, validator run, artefact committed and monitoring wired. The artefact below conforms to content/02-output-contract.xml.

example.note: See `templates/backup-config.example.json` for the schema-conformant filled artefact.
